    • SpiffImportOperations

      public SpiffImportOperations()

  • Method Details

    • listImports

      @DisplayName("List Imports") @Summary("Get a list of all import jobs") @Throws(SpiffErrorTypeProvider.class) @MediaType(value="application/json", strict=false) public String listImports(@Connection SpiffHmacConnection connection)

    • createOrDeleteRecords

      @DisplayName("Create or Delete Records") @Summary("Upsert or delete records for a SPIFF object via import") @Throws(SpiffErrorTypeProvider.class) @MediaType(value="application/json", strict=false) public String createOrDeleteRecords(@Connection SpiffHmacConnection connection, @DisplayName("Import Target") @Summary("Object ID or name: teams, sub_teams, team_members, plan_assignments") String importTarget, @DisplayName("Import Action") @Summary("Operation to perform: 'upsert' or 'delete'") String importAction, @DisplayName("Payload") @Summary("JSON array of records") String payload, @DisplayName("Foreign Keys") @Summary("Optional JSON array of foreign key identifiers") @Optional String foreignKeys)

    • getImport

      @DisplayName("Get Import") @Summary("Get details and status of a single import job") @Throws(SpiffErrorTypeProvider.class) @MediaType(value="application/json", strict=false) public String getImport(@Connection SpiffHmacConnection connection, @DisplayName("Import ID") @Summary("UUID of the import job") String importId)

    • testImport

      @DisplayName("Test Import") @Summary("Validate HMAC-SHA256 signature with the test endpoint") @Throws(SpiffErrorTypeProvider.class) @MediaType(value="application/json", strict=false) public String testImport(@Connection SpiffHmacConnection connection, @DisplayName("Test Body") @Summary("Optional JSON body for signature test") @Optional(defaultValue="{}") String testBody)
